title: ERRO[0000] runroot must be set
body:
### Issue Description

Have no clue what even is this error. No wonder people prefer docker
Set where? set to? why is it not set?
I've done the basic installation guide and it is prebroken out of the box.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

https://wiki.alpinelinux.org/wiki/Podman


### Describe the results you received

ERRO[0000] runroot must be set 

### Describe the results you expected

Basic functionality without having to seethe through half a thousand lines of configs.  

### podman info output

```yaml
localhost:~# podman version
WARN[0000] The storage 'driver' option should be set in /etc/containers/storage.conf. A driver was picked automatically. 
ERRO[0000] runroot must be set
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting
